description: Generate a publication-quality scientific schematic (PRISMA flow, search-strategy flowchart, thematic-synthesis or conceptual-framework diagram) from a natural-language prompt using the AI image pipeline (Nano Banana for generation, Gemini for quality review and smart iterative refinement).
rules: read-only / file-producing — writes only the requested image + a run.log under record_store
calls the OpenRouter API; requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY in env
DOC_TYPE sets the quality threshold (journal 8.5 .. presentation 6.5; default 7.5)
ITERATIONS is capped at 2 by the core
the schematic is written to record_store as schematic.png; run.log captures the generation transcript
usage: Set PROMPT (the diagram description). Optional: DOC_TYPE (journal|conference|poster|presentation|report|grant|thesis|preprint|default), ITERATIONS (1-2). Requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Output: schematic.png (best-effort) + run.log.
limitation: Needs the requests library, OPENROUTER_API_KEY, and outbound network to OpenRouter. Without a key or network the porter degrades: run.log records the failure and no image is produced (run.log is the guaranteed output the contract checks).

vars.PROMPT: PRISMA flow diagram for a systematic review
